svg.title: Standard attention vs FlashAttention: memory and compute traffic
svg.desc: Detailed comparison showing standard attention repeatedly loading and writing full Q, K, S, P, V matrices between HBM memory and compute, versus FlashAttention which loads blocks once, fuses the softmax and output computation in compute using running statistics l and m, and writes the output only once, drastically reducing memory reads and writes.
svg.text: Q, K, V are split into small blocks (i = rows, j = columns).
FlashAttention loops over blocks, updating running softmax stats.
